_comment: Install-time settings SEED for the Sovol SV06 Ace (GitHub #986). Known-good touch-calibration matrix from issue #123 (real, verified values). This is a stopgap because the first-run touch-calibration wizard produces a bad matrix on this panel; seeding valid:true here lands before the app starts so the calibration wizard's step-0 should_skip() sees a valid matrix and is skipped. Read at runtime from the TOP-LEVEL JSON path /input/calibration/* (NOT /display/calibration, which is legacy). DRY: the SAME matrix is duplicated in assets/config/presets/sovol_sv06_ace.json (the runtime preset) -- keep both in sync if either changes.
